predicate_mappings.stroke_nurse_assigned: {} is assigned to the stroke case {}
predicate_mappings.imaging_technologist_assigned: {} is assigned to the imaging case {}
predicate_mappings.final_preprocedure_check_completed: the final pre-procedure check for {} is completed
predicate_mappings.intervention_signoff_complete: the intervention signoff for {} is complete
predicate_mappings.preassigned_intervention_team: {} is the preassigned intervention team for {}
predicate_mappings.patient_transferred_to_intervention_area: {} has been transferred to the intervention area
predicate_mappings.imaging_review_complete: the imaging review for {} is complete

preconditions: I can only register a patient case A if it is not the case that A is registered and it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I register a patient case A, it is the case that A is registered

assign_transport.description: assign a transport unit B to a patient case A
preconditions: I can only assign a transport unit B to a patient case A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available for transport and A is compatible with B
I can only assign a transport unit B to a patient case A if it is not the case that transport is allocated to A
effects: Once I assign a transport unit B to a patient case A, it is the case that A is assigned to B and transport is allocated to A
Once I assign a transport unit B to a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available for transport

release_transport.description: release a transport unit B from a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release a transport unit B from a patient case A if it is the case that A is assigned to B
I can only release a transport unit B from a patient case A if it is not the case that the procedure for A is confirmed and it is not the case that pre procedure checks for A are completed
effects: Once I release a transport unit B from a patient case A, it is the case that B is available for transport

Once I release a transport unit B from a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that A is assigned to B and it is not the case anymore that transport is allocated to A and it is not the case anymore that a specialist is engaged for A and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for the procedure and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional preparation and it is not the case anymore that the intervention signoff for A is complete and it is not the case anymore that the imaging review for A is complete

reserve_telemedicine_link.description: reserve a telemedicine link B for a patient case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a telemedicine link B for a patient case A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available
effects: Once I reserve a telemedicine link B for a patient case A, it is the case that B is allocated to A
Once I reserve a telemedicine link B for a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_telemedicine_link.description: release a telemedicine link B from a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release a telemedicine link B from a patient case A if it is the case that B is allocated to A
effects: Once I release a telemedicine link B from a patient case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a telemedicine link B from a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated to A

engage_specialist_via_telemedicine.description: engage specialist for a patient case A via a telemedicine link B
preconditions: I can only engage specialist for a patient case A via a telemedicine link B if it is the case that A is registered and transport is allocated to A and B is allocated to A
I can only engage specialist for a patient case A via a telemedicine link B if it is not the case that a specialist is engaged for A
effects: Once I engage specialist for a patient case A via a telemedicine link B, it is the case that a specialist is engaged for A

engage_on_call_consultant.description: engage an on call consultant B for a patient case A
preconditions: I can only engage an on call consultant B for a patient case A if it is the case that A is registered and transport is allocated to A and B is on call
I can only engage an on call consultant B for a patient case A if it is not the case that a specialist is engaged for A
effects: Once I engage an on call consultant B for a patient case A, it is the case that a specialist is engaged for A and A requires additional preparation
Once I engage an on call consultant B for a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is on call

confirm_equipment_and_mark_ready.description: confirm an equipment package C and a telemedicine link B for a patient case A and mark a patient case A as ready for the procedure
preconditions: I can only confirm an equipment package C and a telemedicine link B for a patient case A and mark a patient case A as ready for the procedure if it is the case that a specialist is engaged for A and transport is allocated to A and B is allocated to A and C is available
I can only confirm an equipment package C and a telemedicine link B for a patient case A and mark a patient case A as ready for the procedure if it is not the case that A is ready for the procedure
effects: Once I confirm an equipment package C and a telemedicine link B for a patient case A and mark a patient case A as ready for the procedure, it is the case that A is ready for the procedure

Once I confirm an equipment package C and a telemedicine link B for a patient case A and mark a patient case A as ready for the procedure, it is not the case anymore that A requires additional preparation

confirm_procedural_prerequisites_with_te.description: confirm procedural prerequisites for a patient case A with an intervention team B
preconditions: I can only confirm procedural prerequisites for a patient case A with an intervention team B if it is the case that transport is allocated to A and B has been notified for A
I can only confirm procedural prerequisites for a patient case A with an intervention team B if it is not the case that A is ready for the procedure
effects: Once I confirm procedural prerequisites for a patient case A with an intervention team B, it is the case that A is ready for the procedure
Once I confirm procedural prerequisites for a patient case A with an intervention team B, it is not the case anymore that A requires additional preparation

reserve_nurse.description: reserve a stroke nurse B for a patient case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a stroke nurse B for a patient case A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and B is compatible with A
effects: Once I reserve a stroke nurse B for a patient case A, it is the case that B is assigned to the stroke case A
Once I reserve a stroke nurse B for a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_nurse.description: release a stroke nurse B from a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release a stroke nurse B from a patient case A if it is the case that B is assigned to the stroke case A
effects: Once I release a stroke nurse B from a patient case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a stroke nurse B from a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to the stroke case A

reserve_imaging_technologist.description: reserve an imaging technologist B for a patient case A
preconditions: I can only reserve an imaging technologist B for a patient case A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and B is compatible with A
effects: Once I reserve an imaging technologist B for a patient case A, it is the case that B is assigned to the imaging case A
Once I reserve an imaging technologist B for a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_imaging_technologist.description: release an imaging technologist B from a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release an imaging technologist B from a patient case A if it is the case that B is assigned to the imaging case A
effects: Once I release an imaging technologist B from a patient case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release an imaging technologist B from a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to the imaging case A

reserve_bed.description: reserve a critical care bed B for a patient case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a critical care bed B for a patient case A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and B is suitable for A
effects: Once I reserve a critical care bed B for a patient case A, it is the case that B is assigned to the case A
Once I reserve a critical care bed B for a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_bed.description: release a critical care bed B from a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release a critical care bed B from a patient case A if it is the case that B is assigned to the case A
effects: Once I release a critical care bed B from a patient case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a critical care bed B from a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is assigned to the case A

reserve_medication_kit.description: reserve a medication kit B for a patient case A
preconditions: I can only reserve a medication kit B for a patient case A if it is the case that A is registered and B is available and B is suitable for A
effects: Once I reserve a medication kit B for a patient case A, it is the case that B is allocated to the case A
Once I reserve a medication kit B for a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available

release_medication_kit.description: release a medication kit B from a patient case A
preconditions: I can only release a medication kit B from a patient case A if it is the case that B is allocated to the case A
effects: Once I release a medication kit B from a patient case A, it is the case that B is available
Once I release a medication kit B from a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is allocated to the case A

perform_clinical_assessment_and_schedule.description: perform clinical assessment and schedule a patient case A with a procedure slot B, a stroke nurse C, and an imaging technologist D
preconditions: I can only perform clinical assessment and schedule a patient case A with a procedure slot B, a stroke nurse C, and an imaging technologist D if it is the case that transport is allocated to A and C is assigned to the stroke case A and D is assigned to the imaging case A and B is available and A is compatible with B

I can only perform clinical assessment and schedule a patient case A with a procedure slot B, a stroke nurse C, and an imaging technologist D if it is not the case that the procedure for A is confirmed
effects: Once I perform clinical assessment and schedule a patient case A with a procedure slot B, a stroke nurse C, and an imaging technologist D, it is the case that B is reserved for the case A and the procedure for A is confirmed
Once I perform clinical assessment and schedule a patient case A with a procedure slot B, a stroke nurse C, and an imaging technologist D, it is not the case anymore that B is available

perform_imaging_assessment_and_schedule.description: perform imaging assessment and schedule a patient case A with a procedure slot B, a critical care bed C, and an angiography room D
preconditions: I can only perform imaging assessment and schedule a patient case A with a procedure slot B, a critical care bed C, and an angiography room D if it is the case that transport is allocated to A and C is assigned to the case A and D is available and B is available and A is compatible with B and D is suitable for A

I can only perform imaging assessment and schedule a patient case A with a procedure slot B, a critical care bed C, and an angiography room D if it is not the case that the procedure for A is confirmed
effects: Once I perform imaging assessment and schedule a patient case A with a procedure slot B, a critical care bed C, and an angiography room D, it is the case that B is reserved for the case A and the procedure for A is confirmed and the imaging review for A is complete and A requires additional preparation

Once I perform imaging assessment and schedule a patient case A with a procedure slot B, a critical care bed C, and an angiography room D, it is not the case anymore that B is available and it is not the case anymore that D is available

finalize_decision_after_assessment.description: finalize decision after assessment for a patient case A with a stroke nurse B and an imaging technologist C
preconditions: I can only finalize decision after assessment for a patient case A with a stroke nurse B and an imaging technologist C if it is the case that the procedure for A is confirmed and the imaging review for A is complete and B is assigned to the stroke case A and C is assigned to the imaging case A
effects: Once I finalize decision after assessment for a patient case A with a stroke nurse B and an imaging technologist C, it is not the case anymore that the imaging review for A is complete and it is not the case anymore that A requires additional preparation

confirm_team_and_signoff_pathway.description: confirm team and sign off pathway for a patient case A with a stroke nurse B, an imaging technologist C, and an intervention team shift D
preconditions: I can only confirm team and sign off pathway for a patient case A with a stroke nurse B, an imaging technologist C, and an intervention team shift D if it is the case that A is ready for the procedure and the procedure for A is confirmed and B is assigned to the stroke case A and C is assigned to the imaging case A and shift assignment compatible A D

I can only confirm team and sign off pathway for a patient case A with a stroke nurse B, an imaging technologist C, and an intervention team shift D if it is not the case that A requires additional preparation and it is not the case that pre procedure checks for A are completed
effects: Once I confirm team and sign off pathway for a patient case A with a stroke nurse B, an imaging technologist C, and an intervention team shift D, it is the case that pre procedure checks for A are completed

confirm_complex_team_and_signoff.description: confirm complex team and sign off for a patient case A with a critical care bed B, a medication kit C, and an anesthesia team shift D
preconditions: I can only confirm complex team and sign off for a patient case A with a critical care bed B, a medication kit C, and an anesthesia team shift D if it is the case that A is ready for the procedure and the procedure for A is confirmed and B is assigned to the case A and C is allocated to the case A and shift assignment compatible A D

I can only confirm complex team and sign off for a patient case A with a critical care bed B, a medication kit C, and an anesthesia team shift D if it is not the case that pre procedure checks for A are completed
effects: Once I confirm complex team and sign off for a patient case A with a critical care bed B, a medication kit C, and an anesthesia team shift D, it is the case that pre procedure checks for A are completed and A requires additional preparation

authorize_intervention_and_allocate.description: authorize intervention and allocate resources for a patient case A with a stroke nurse B and an imaging technologist C
preconditions: I can only authorize intervention and allocate resources for a patient case A with a stroke nurse B and an imaging technologist C if it is the case that pre procedure checks for A are completed and A requires additional preparation and B is assigned to the stroke case A and C is assigned to the imaging case A
effects: Once I authorize intervention and allocate resources for a patient case A with a stroke nurse B and an imaging technologist C, it is the case that the intervention signoff for A is complete

Once I authorize intervention and allocate resources for a patient case A with a stroke nurse B and an imaging technologist C, it is not the case anymore that A requires additional preparation and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for the procedure and it is not the case anymore that the imaging review for A is complete

prepare_intervention_with_equipment.description: prepare intervention for a patient case A using a telemedicine link B and an equipment package C
preconditions: I can only prepare intervention for a patient case A using a telemedicine link B and an equipment package C if it is the case that the intervention signoff for A is complete and pre procedure checks for A are completed and transport is allocated to A and B is allocated to A and C is available
I can only prepare intervention for a patient case A using a telemedicine link B and an equipment package C if it is not the case that A is ready for the procedure
effects: Once I prepare intervention for a patient case A using a telemedicine link B and an equipment package C, it is the case that A is ready for the procedure

complete_final_preprocedure_check_link.description: complete final pre procedure check for a patient case A using a telemedicine link B
preconditions: I can only complete final pre procedure check for a patient case A using a telemedicine link B if it is the case that pre procedure checks for A are completed and A is ready for the procedure and B is allocated to A

I can only complete final pre procedure check for a patient case A using a telemedicine link B if it is not the case that A requires additional preparation and it is not the case that the final pre procedure check for A is completed
effects: Once I complete final pre procedure check for a patient case A using a telemedicine link B, it is the case that the final pre procedure check for A is completed

complete_final_preprocedure_check_consul.description: complete final pre procedure check for a patient case A with an on call consultant B
preconditions: I can only complete final pre procedure check for a patient case A with an on call consultant B if it is the case that pre procedure checks for A are completed and A is ready for the procedure and B is on call

I can only complete final pre procedure check for a patient case A with an on call consultant B if it is not the case that A requires additional preparation and it is not the case that the final pre procedure check for A is completed
effects: Once I complete final pre procedure check for a patient case A with an on call consultant B, it is the case that the final pre procedure check for A is completed
Once I complete final pre procedure check for a patient case A with an on call consultant B, it is not the case anymore that B is on call

allocate_intervention_team.description: allocate an intervention team B to a patient case A
preconditions: I can only allocate an intervention team B to a patient case A if it is the case that the final pre procedure check for A is completed and B is available for intervention and B is compatible with A
effects: Once I allocate an intervention team B to a patient case A, it is the case that B is assigned to the case A
Once I allocate an intervention team B to a patient case A, it is not the case anymore that B is available for intervention

notify_intervention_team_teletriage.description: notify an intervention team C about a teletriage patient A related to a pre hospital patient B
preconditions: I can only notify an intervention team C about a teletriage patient A related to a pre hospital patient B if it is the case that A is registered and A is a teletriage entry and C is the preassigned intervention team for A and C is assigned to the case B
I can only notify an intervention team C about a teletriage patient A related to a pre hospital patient B if it is not the case that C has been notified for A
effects: Once I notify an intervention team C about a teletriage patient A related to a pre hospital patient B, it is the case that C has been notified for A

mark_patient_ready_after_teletriage.description: mark a patient case A as ready after teletriage with a telemedicine link B and an equipment package C
preconditions: I can only mark a patient case A as ready after teletriage with a telemedicine link B and an equipment package C if it is the case that A is registered and A is a teletriage entry and A is ready for the procedure and the final pre procedure check for A is completed and B is allocated to A and C is available
I can only mark a patient case A as ready after teletriage with a telemedicine link B and an equipment package C if it is not the case that A has been transferred to the intervention area
effects: Once I mark a patient case A as ready after teletriage with a telemedicine link B and an equipment package C, it is the case that A has been transferred to the intervention area

close_case_within_window.description: close a patient case A within the activation window
preconditions: I can only close a patient case A within the activation window if it is the case that A is within the activation window and A is registered and transport is allocated to A and the procedure for A is confirmed and pre procedure checks for A are completed and the final pre procedure check for A is completed and A is ready for the procedure
I can only close a patient case A within the activation window if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a patient case A within the activation window, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_with_team_notified.description: close a patient case A with an intervention team B notified
preconditions: I can only close a patient case A with an intervention team B notified if it is the case that A is a teletriage entry and A is registered and transport is allocated to A and the procedure for A is confirmed and pre procedure checks for A are completed and the final pre procedure check for A is completed and A is ready for the procedure and B has been notified for A
I can only close a patient case A with an intervention team B notified if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a patient case A with an intervention team B notified, it is the case that A is closed

close_case_after_transfer.description: close a patient case A after transfer to the intervention area
preconditions: I can only close a patient case A after transfer to the intervention area if it is the case that A is a teletriage entry and A is registered and transport is allocated to A and the procedure for A is confirmed and pre procedure checks for A are completed and the final pre procedure check for A is completed and A is ready for the procedure and A has been transferred to the intervention area
I can only close a patient case A after transfer to the intervention area if it is not the case that A is closed
effects: Once I close a patient case A after transfer to the intervention area, it is the case that A is closed

action_nl_templates.assign_transport: assign transport unit {?transport_unit} to patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates.release_transport: release transport unit {?transport_unit} from patient case {?case}

action_nl_templates.release_nurse: release stroke nurse {?stroke_nurse} from patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_imaging_technologist: reserve imaging technologist {?imaging_technologist} for patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates.release_imaging_technologist: release imaging technologist {?imaging_technologist} from patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_bed: reserve critical care bed {?critical_care_bed} for patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates.release_bed: release critical care bed {?critical_care_bed} from patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates.reserve_medication_kit: reserve medication kit {?medication_kit} for patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates.release_medication_kit: release medication kit {?medication_kit} from patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates.perform_clinical_assessment_and_schedule: perform clinical assessment and schedule patient case {?case} with procedure slot {?procedure_slot}, stroke nurse {?stroke_nurse}, and imaging technologist {?imaging_technologist}
action_nl_templates.perform_imaging_assessment_and_schedule: perform imaging assessment and schedule patient case {?case} with procedure slot {?procedure_slot}, critical care bed {?critical_care_bed}, and angiography room {?angiography_room}

action_nl_templates.authorize_intervention_and_allocate: authorize intervention and allocate resources for patient case {?case} with stroke nurse {?stroke_nurse} and imaging technologist {?imaging_technologist}
action_nl_templates.prepare_intervention_with_equipment: prepare intervention for patient case {?case} using telemedicine link {?telemedicine_link} and equipment package {?equipment_package}
action_nl_templates.complete_final_preprocedure_check_link: complete final pre-procedure check for patient case {?case} using telemedicine link {?telemedicine_link}
action_nl_templates.complete_final_preprocedure_check_consul: complete final pre-procedure check for patient case {?case} with on call consultant {?on_call_consultant}
action_nl_templates.allocate_intervention_team: allocate intervention team {?intervention_team} to patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates.notify_intervention_team_teletriage: notify intervention team {?intervention_team} about teletriage patient {?teletriage_patient} related to pre hospital patient {?pre_hospital_patient}
action_nl_templates.mark_patient_ready_after_teletriage: mark patient case {?case} as ready after teletriage with telemedicine link {?telemedicine_link} and equipment package {?equipment_package}
action_nl_templates.close_case_within_window: close patient case {?case} within the activation window
action_nl_templates.close_case_with_team_notified: close patient case {?case} with intervention team {?intervention_team} notified
action_nl_templates.close_case_after_transfer: close patient case {?case} after transfer to the intervention area

predicate_nl_templates.stroke_nurse_assigned: {?stroke_nurse} is assigned to the stroke case {?case}
predicate_nl_templates.imaging_technologist_assigned: {?imaging_technologist} is assigned to the imaging case {?case}
predicate_nl_templates.final_preprocedure_check_completed: the final pre-procedure check for {?case} is completed
predicate_nl_templates.intervention_signoff_complete: the intervention signoff for {?case} is complete
predicate_nl_templates.preassigned_intervention_team: {?intervention_team} is the preassigned intervention team for {?case}
predicate_nl_templates.patient_transferred_to_intervention_area: {?case} has been transferred to the intervention area
predicate_nl_templates.imaging_review_complete: the imaging review for {?case} is complete

action_nl_templates_indef.assign_transport: assign a transport unit {?transport_unit} to a patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_transport: release a transport unit {?transport_unit} from a patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_telemedicine_link: reserve a telemedicine link {?telemedicine_link} for a patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_telemedicine_link: release a telemedicine link {?telemedicine_link} from a patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.engage_specialist_via_telemedicine: engage specialist for a patient case {?case} via a telemedicine link {?telemedicine_link}
action_nl_templates_indef.engage_on_call_consultant: engage an on call consultant {?on_call_consultant} for a patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_equipment_and_mark_ready: confirm an equipment package {?equipment_package} and a telemedicine link {?telemedicine_link} for a patient case {?case} and mark a patient case {?case} as ready for the procedure
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_procedural_prerequisites_with_te: confirm procedural prerequisites for a patient case {?case} with an intervention team {?intervention_team}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_nurse: reserve a stroke nurse {?stroke_nurse} for a patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_nurse: release a stroke nurse {?stroke_nurse} from a patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_imaging_technologist: reserve an imaging technologist {?imaging_technologist} for a patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_imaging_technologist: release an imaging technologist {?imaging_technologist} from a patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_bed: reserve a critical care bed {?critical_care_bed} for a patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_bed: release a critical care bed {?critical_care_bed} from a patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.reserve_medication_kit: reserve a medication kit {?medication_kit} for a patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.release_medication_kit: release a medication kit {?medication_kit} from a patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.perform_clinical_assessment_and_schedule: perform clinical assessment and schedule a patient case {?case} with a procedure slot {?procedure_slot}, a stroke nurse {?stroke_nurse}, and an imaging technologist {?imaging_technologist}
action_nl_templates_indef.perform_imaging_assessment_and_schedule: perform imaging assessment and schedule a patient case {?case} with a procedure slot {?procedure_slot}, a critical care bed {?critical_care_bed}, and an angiography room {?angiography_room}
action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_decision_after_assessment: finalize decision after assessment for a patient case {?case} with a stroke nurse {?stroke_nurse} and an imaging technologist {?imaging_technologist}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_team_and_signoff_pathway: confirm team and sign off pathway for a patient case {?case} with a stroke nurse {?stroke_nurse}, an imaging technologist {?imaging_technologist}, and an intervention team shift {?intervention_team_shift}
action_nl_templates_indef.confirm_complex_team_and_signoff: confirm complex team and sign off for a patient case {?case} with a critical care bed {?critical_care_bed}, a medication kit {?medication_kit}, and an anesthesia team shift {?anesthesia_team_shift}
action_nl_templates_indef.authorize_intervention_and_allocate: authorize intervention and allocate resources for a patient case {?case} with a stroke nurse {?stroke_nurse} and an imaging technologist {?imaging_technologist}
action_nl_templates_indef.prepare_intervention_with_equipment: prepare intervention for a patient case {?case} using a telemedicine link {?telemedicine_link} and an equipment package {?equipment_package}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_final_preprocedure_check_link: complete final pre-procedure check for a patient case {?case} using a telemedicine link {?telemedicine_link}
action_nl_templates_indef.complete_final_preprocedure_check_consul: complete final pre-procedure check for a patient case {?case} with an on call consultant {?on_call_consultant}
action_nl_templates_indef.allocate_intervention_team: allocate an intervention team {?intervention_team} to a patient case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.notify_intervention_team_teletriage: notify an intervention team {?intervention_team} about a teletriage patient {?teletriage_patient} related to a pre hospital patient {?pre_hospital_patient}
action_nl_templates_indef.mark_patient_ready_after_teletriage: mark a patient case {?case} as ready after teletriage with a telemedicine link {?telemedicine_link} and an equipment package {?equipment_package}
action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_within_window: close a patient case {?case} within the activation window
action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_with_team_notified: close a patient case {?case} with an intervention team {?intervention_team} notified
action_nl_templates_indef.close_case_after_transfer: close a patient case {?case} after transfer to the intervention area

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a patient case or a transport unit or a procedure slot or a imaging technologist or a stroke nurse or a critical care bed or a telemedicine link or a on call consultant or a intervention team or a equipment package or a angiography room or a medication kit or a shift assignment is also a object
Everything that is a intervention team shift or a anesthesia team shift is also a shift assignment
Everything that is a pre hospital patient or a teletriage patient is also a patient case
